title: modern-web-guidance is mandatory for all frontend work
author: cross-project-invariant
policy: CLAUDE.md → 'modern-web-guidance is mandatory for all frontend work' (canonical policy, embedded verbatim)

assertions.description: Every frontend implementation/modification consulted the modern-web-guidance skill FIRST for its specific UI/API topics and applied its recommendations (or justified an exception with evidence). The demo's critique artifact records this in `guidanceConsulted` (ids/queries + recommendation + appliedOrException); a frontend-touching critique with an empty `guidanceConsulted` is INCOMPLETE and the gate fails it.

The repo records the modern-web-guidance skill source + version + update path (canonical skill `modern-web-guidance`, scripted fallback `npx -y modern-web-guidance@latest`, no vendored copy) so routines stay current.
